CRANK_TRACE_001 — atom-table mutation observed during traced turn.

Severity: warning. Captured when `:atom_table_check` is enabled and the
atom-count snapshot before/after the turn shows growth. New atoms are
VM-global and cannot be GC'd; treating each new atom as a violation
catches accidental atom creation via String.to_atom/1 and friends.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/purity_trace_test.exs — the atom-table-check test.
